title: January 8
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 8''' is the 8th day of the year. 357 days (358 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>

*[[1920s#1921|1921]] – [[Lee J. Ames]] is born.
*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Sidney Ganis]] is born.
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Terry Brooks]] is born.
*[[1960s#1963|1963]] – [[Geoff Bell]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Susie Porter]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Tommy Lee Edwards]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Juan Frigeri]] is born.
*[[1986]] – [[Pierce Cravens]] is born.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Star Wars: A New Hope - The Special Edition 1]]'' published.
*1997 – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 4]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]] published at newsstands.
*[[2003]] – [[Republic 48|''Republic'' 48]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 1 (2014)|''The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 1'']] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Classic Newspaper Comics Vol. 2]]'' released.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Pirate's Price]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Vol. 4 — The Catastrophe Con]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars Resistance: Meet the Pilots]]'' published.
*[[2020]] – [[The Rise of Kylo Ren 2|''The Rise of Kylo Ren'' 2]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Battle of Jakku — Last Stand 2|''Battle of Jakku — Last Stand'' 2]] published.
